title: DLSA Bhagalpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 200 Para Legal Volunteer Posts
description: District Legal Services Authority (DLSA) Bhagalpur has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 200 Para Legal Volunteer Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass can grab this chance and apply for the DLSA Bhagalpur Recruitment 2026 . Here we include the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the deadline of appli...
